candidates.text: I got smoked in the ribs by somebody's drive today while sitting in my cart waiting to tee off myself. First time I've ever been hit by a stray shot on the course. It hurt, but it could've been a lot worse. The reason I tell this story is what happened after. I was sitting in my cart waiting for the group in the fairway ahead of me to clear out, in the shade under some trees because it was 94 degrees out. And, also because trees should provide some protection from stray shots! Oh, the irony....
